MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael J. Plocki, Esq. of GORDON & REES (415-986-5900), appearing for defendant / moving party SSW, Inc., f.k.a. National Dynamics Corporation and as Nebraska Boiler Company, a division of National Dynamics Corporation
Jennifer K. Berg, Esq. of BARON & BUDD, P.C. (510-531-6044), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Carolyn Robinson

RULING:
Defendant SSW, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant SSW, Inc., f.k.a. National Dynamics Corporation and as Nebraska Boiler Company, a division of National Dynamics Corporation's motion for summary judgment is granted. Whether Corporations Code 2010 applies to non-California corporations is unclear. There is a conflict in decisions of the California Courts of Appeal and the issue is currently pending before the California Supreme Court. This court believes that the better-reasoned view is that 2010 only applies to California corporations. Even if 2010 applies to defendant and thus plaintiffs' claims against defendant are not barred because defendant was sued after expiration of the Nebraska survival period for dissolved corporations, defendant sustained its burden and plaintiffs have not presented sufficient evidence that Mr. Robinson was exposed to an asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
